en_title: RuneScape: Dragonwilds Launches on Consoles Later in 2026, Sony Picks Up Spinoff for PS Plus
cn_title: 《RuneScape：龙荒》年内登陆PS5，索尼纳入PS Plus首发
subtitle: 25年首次上主机
opus_summary: 开发商Jagex宣布，《RuneScape：龙荒》将于2026年晚些时候登陆PS5，这是该系列25年来首次从PC扩展到主机平台。索尼State of Play确认，游戏将首发加入PS Plus Extra和Premium。该作是一款开放世界生存建造游戏，PC版已在Steam售出100万份，获「特别好评」。主系列《RuneScape》自2001年推出，目前仅有PC和移动端版本，主机版尚属首次。

paragraphs.en: RuneScape: Dragonwilds launches on PlayStation 5 later in 2026, developer Jagex has announced, marking the first time the RuneScape IP has made the jump from PC to consoles in its 25-year history.
paragraphs.cn: 开发商Jagex宣布，《RuneScape：龙荒》将于2026年晚些时候登陆PS5，这是《RuneScape》IP诞生25年来首次从PC跨足主机平台。

paragraphs.en: As confirmed during Sony’s State of Play showcase, RuneScape: Dragonwilds also joins PlayStation Plus Extra and Premium at launch as a day one title.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼State of Play发布会确认，《RuneScape：龙荒》将首发加入PlayStation Plus Extra和Premium会员库。

paragraphs.en: RuneScape: Dragonwilds is an open-world survival crafting game from Jagex that has already sold 1 million copies on PC via Steam, where it has a ‘very positive’ user review rating. Here’s the official blurb:
paragraphs.cn: 《RuneScape：龙荒》是Jagex开发的开放世界生存建造游戏，PC版已在Steam售出100万份，用户评测为「特别好评」。官方介绍如下：

paragraphs.en: The main RuneScape game — the long-running medieval fantasy MMO that launched in 2001 — is available to play on PC and mobile in modern RuneScape and Old School RuneScape form, but neither is on consoles.
paragraphs.cn: 主系列《RuneScape》是一款2001年推出的中世纪奇幻MMO，目前以《RuneScape》和《Old School RuneScape》两种形式在PC和移动端运营，但均未登陆主机。

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch up on what PlayStation has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如需了解PlayStation的后续计划，可查看2026年6月State of Play的全部发布内容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
